owner_intent: transactional: who will design and build the system
planned_change: Deepen implementation scope, integrations, roles and states, delivery model, proof and CTA; add contextual links to the guide, use case and pain page
execution_gate: Production P0 redirects and final canonicals must pass one-hop HTTP acceptance tests before measurement starts
acceptance_criteria: One H1 and existing contract preserved; service answers who builds it; no duplicated guide/use-case/problem sections; contextual links use canonical URLs
measurement_window: 28 stable days after deployment versus the preceding comparable 28-day period
rollback: Revert only this page's copy and contextual links; preserve canonical and merged URL owner

planned_change: Keep the new canonical CTA/form event instrumentation; inspect the GTM container before deciding whether GTM or direct gtag owns GA4 page views; remove or disable a duplicate path only with configuration access and measurement QA

acceptance_criteria: Exactly one GA4 page_view per navigation after configuration; no duplicate GA configuration; consent behavior is preserved; CTA/form event names and parameters are documented; no PII is sent
measurement_window: QA before configuration change and compare event counts for 7 days after release
rollback: Revert event wiring or the later GTM/gtag ownership change if page views, consent or conversions regress
